title: Owen (disambiguation)
content:
'''Owen''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] name in [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]]. Notable Owens included:

*[[Owen (Kenobi)|Owen]], brother of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]
*[[Owen Delstar]], [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] [[Commander/Legends|Commander]]
*[[Owen Lars/Legends|Owen Lars]], uncle of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]
*[[Nile Owen]], [[Moff/Legends|Moff]], of the [[Rayter sector/Legends|Rayter sector]]
*[[Owen Sareth]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] operative

===See also===
*[[Jason Owen]]
*[[Owen K.C. Stephens]]
*[[Rena Owen]]
{{Disambig}}
